error_signature: This value must be greater than or equal to 1
title: Stripe payment intent minimum value error
symptom: When attempting to create a payment intent with a price below the minimum threshold, Stripe returns an error stating 'This value must be greater than or equal to 1'.
applies_when: Setting a payment amount below 1 dollar
not_this_if: Payment amount is 1 dollar or more
root_cause: Stripe has a minimum payment amount requirement, which is set to 1 dollar. If the amount specified for the payment intent is below this threshold, the API will reject the request with an error message.
fix_steps: Ensure the payment amount is set to at least 1 dollar
Update the payment intent creation logic to handle amounts below the minimum
agent_instruction: Adjust the payment amount to be at least 1 dollar before creating the payment intent.
